scenario.name: SUBSCRIBE UAS (presence notifier)
scenario.send:
NOTIFY sip:watcher@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:watcher@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Event: presence Subscription-State: active;expires=3600 Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/pidf+xml Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <presence xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf" entity="sip:[service]@[local_ip]"> <tuple id="t1"> <status><basic>open</basic></status> </tuple> </presence>

NOTIFY sip:watcher@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:watcher@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 NOTIFY Event: presence Subscription-State: terminated;reason=timeout Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
